research.title: Research
research.content:
My current research is on **privacy-preserving machine learning and federated agents (learning)**. I am generally interested in **advancing the efficiency, privacy, and trustworthiness of foundation models in distributed systems**. My research focuses on challenges encountered when deploying AI methods in real-world commercial environments, including accelerating training and inference, protecting confidential and private data, avoiding data breaches of companies' databases, preventing copyright infringement, and improving the stability and robustness of foundation model systems. Below are some examples of my contributions:

- **Data Breach:** Assessing the extent of data leakage in various settings, including LLMs ([TBD](/assests/papers/tbd-24.pdf)), RAG systems ([ICLR](https://openreview.net/forum?id=5DfhoxRPXh)), vision transformers ([CVPR](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=GuXxYkFBBy), [ICDM](/assests/papers/Privacy-Preserving-Split-Learning-via-Patch-Shuffling-over-Transformers.pdf)), and diffusion models ([WACV](/assests/papers/wacv-25.pdf)).
- **Copyright:** Developing strategies for model developers to protect their model copyrights.
- **Utility:** Improving the efficiency of knowledge aggregation across multiple agents: FoT ([ICLR](https://openreview.net/forum?id=OxFGVlUSAH)).
- **Efficiency:** Enhancing distributed training and efficient inference such as studying KVCache compression ([NeurIPS](https://openreview.net/forum?id=OtZtLYAdQY)).
- **Customer Personalization:** Advancing personalized federated learning ([AAAI](/assests/papers/dyao-aaai24.pdf), [ICDCS](assests/papers/Federated_Model_Search_via_Reinforcement_Learning.pdf), [BigData](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2409.08858)).
- **Open-Source Platforms:** Contributing to edge–cloud computing frameworks ([IMWUT](https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3494981), [ICDCS](assests/papers/lwang-icdcs20.pdf)) and federated learning platforms ([Plato](https://github.com/TL-System/plato)).

about.title: About Me
about.content:
I am currently a first-year PhD student at University of Chicago. My supervisor is [Tian Li](https://litian96.github.io/). I also work closely with [Tahseen Rabbani](https://twr7bm.github.io/).

Before I began my PhD study, I was a machine learning engineer at [EV.com](https://ev.com) and [CarAI.com](https://www.carai.com/) where I built complete agent pipelines from scratch for customer service at car dealerships. I was one of the lead team members on the backend where we built a database system, multi-language TTS, a GraphRAG system to store inventory information, agents with various DMS tools via MCP, and cloud deployment. The company made significant profits ([News](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/mills-motors-buick-gmc-recovers-35000-monthly-service-revenue-carai-locic/)) by deploying CarAI agents for big dealerships across Canada and the US.

I received my Master's degree from the Department of [Electrical and Computer Engineering](https://www.ece.utoronto.ca/) at the [University of Toronto](https://utoronto.ca/). I previously worked in [iQua](https://iqua.ece.toronto.edu/) and collaborated with [Baochun Li](https://iqua.ece.toronto.edu/bli/). During my master's, I also founded a start-up [HemligAI](https://hemligca.github.io/), studying privacy-preserving solutions for foundation models. Although I currently do not actively get involved in company business, we are still receiving several awards across the world.

I received my bachelor's degree from the Department of [CSE](https://www.cs.sjtu.edu.cn/en/) at Shanghai Jiao Tong University. During my undergraduate studies, I was a research intern at [John Hopcroft Center for Computer Science](https://jhc.sjtu.edu.cn/), advised by [Liyao Xiang](http://xiangliyao.cn/) and [Xinbing Wang](https://www.cs.sjtu.edu.cn/~wang-xb/). Meanwhile, I took a research fellowship at Max Planck Society, advised by [Yiting Xia](https://sites.google.com/view/yitingxia?pli=1), [Binghang Yuan](https://binhangyuan.github.io/site/) and [Florin Dinu](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=zmI-4VkAAAAJ&hl=en). I speak Mandarin, English, and French.
